ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Player's draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country of origin */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's primary colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "era" TEXT /* Era of the season (e.g., 1990-94) */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 1990-91) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Games played by the player in that season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three pointers made */,
  "three_pointer_percentage" REAL /* Three pointer percentage */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers made by the player */,
  "per" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "defensive_rating" REAL /* Defensive rating */,
  "offensive_rating" REAL /* Offensive rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eras" (
  "era_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each era */,
  "era_name" TEXT /* Name of the era */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the era */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the era */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the era */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("era_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league's commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the coach */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's image */,
  "previous_teams" TEXT /* List of previous teams the coach has coached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season, playoffs, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_received" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_level" TEXT /* Level of the award (e.g., league, conference, team) */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics_overview" (
  "overview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the overview entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player in their career */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in their career */,
  "avg_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game throughout their career */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in their career */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the player in their career */,
  "total_steals" INTEGER /* Total steals made by the player in their career */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player in their career */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the player in their career */,
  "total_per" REAL /* Total player efficiency rating */,
  "total_true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* Total true shooting percentage */,
  "total_effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Total effective field goal percentage */,
  "total_defensive_rating" REAL /* Total defensive rating */,
  "total_offensive_rating" REAL /* Total offensive rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_overview_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on social media */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares on social media */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on social media */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on social media */,
  "tweets" INTEGER /* Number of tweets or posts */,
  "media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of media mentions */,
  "fan_rating" REAL /* Fan rating based on fan engagement metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
